context: Tests whether the agent knows to switch from line diff to hierarchical comparison for large templates and understands the threshold for this decision.

checklist.name: Problem threshold identified
checklist.description: large-template-strategy.md mentions a specific line count threshold (e.g., >5000 lines) when diff becomes unmanageable

checklist.name: Hierarchical approach recommended
checklist.description: Document explicitly recommends hierarchical comparison instead of line diff for large templates

checklist.name: Structure comparison first
checklist.description: Comparison steps include checking top-level structure (keys) first

checklist.name: Resource count comparison
checklist.description: Comparison steps include checking resource counts (jq '.Resources | length')

checklist.name: Added/removed resources
checklist.description: Comparison steps include identifying which resources were added/removed

checklist.name: Avoid line diff
checklist.description: large-template-compare.sh uses jq, comm, or diff with process substitution rather than raw 'diff file1 file2'

checklist.name: Summarized output
checklist.description: Script commands produce concise output (counts, lists) rather than full template diffs

checklist.name: Decision criteria clear
checklist.description: Document explains when to use hierarchical vs line diff (based on size/complexity)

checklist.name: Security focused subset
checklist.description: Strategy mentions focusing on security-sensitive changes (IAM, CDK Nag) rather than all resources
